description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push events. The workflow has three jobs: build_docker, build_mac, and build_windows. The build_docker job runs on ubuntu-latest, cleans up the environment, checks out the repository with submodules, sets up Docker, and builds Docker images for multiple targets. The build_mac job runs on macos-latest, checks out the repository with submodules, and uses cmake and ctest actions to build and test the project. The build_windows job runs on windows-latest, checks out the repository with submodules, and uses cmake and ctest actions to build and test the project with different shared library configurations.
